question: What is the difference between Pre-LayerNorm and Post-LayerNorm in transformer blocks? Pre-LN applies norm before the sublayer, Post-LN applies after.
code_hint: Pre-LN: x = x + Sublayer(LayerNorm(x)), Post-LN: x = LayerNorm(x + Sublayer(x))
expected_output:
Pre-LN: x = x + Sublayer(LayerNorm(x))
Post-LN: x = LayerNorm(x + Sublayer(x))
